metrics.name: PCIRdCur (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe read bytes, calculated as the sum of PCIe full cache line read misses and hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: PCIRdCur Miss (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe read bytes due to full cache line read misses multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: PCIRdCur Hit (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe read bytes due to full cache line read hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: ItoM (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes, calculated as the sum of PCIe full cache line write misses and hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: ItoM Miss (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes due to full cache line write misses multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: ItoM Hit (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes due to full cache line write hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: ItoMCacheNear (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes for partial cache line writes, calculated as the sum of partial write misses and hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: ItoMCacheNear Miss (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes for partial cache line write misses multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: ItoMCacheNear Hit (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes for partial cache line write hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: Total Read (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe read bytes system-wide, calculated as the sum of PCIe full cache line read misses and hits multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: Total Write (B)
metrics.description: Total PCIe write bytes system-wide, calculated as the sum of all PCIe write misses and hits (both full and partial cache line) multiplied by 64 bytes per cache line.

metrics.name: WCILF
metrics.description: Number of full cache line write requests issued by CPU to IO device. Includes MOVDIR64.

metrics.name: WCIL
metrics.description: Number of partial cache line write requests issued by CPU to IO device. Includes MOVDIRI.

metrics.name: WiL Miss
metrics.description: Number of WiL (Write Invalidate Line) requests issued by CPU that missed cache.

metrics.name: UCRdF Miss
metrics.description: Number of UCRdF (Uncached Read Full) requests issued by CPU that missed cache.
